title: The Terror of Doctor Mabuse
writer: Ladislas Fodor, Robert A. Stemmle, Thea von Harbou
actors: Gert Fröbe, Senta Berger, Helmut Schmid
plot: German Police Inspector Lohmann investigates a string of crimes resembling Dr. Mabuse's M.O. but Mabuse is in Professor Polland's care inside an insane asylum.
